PLAINTIFF LORI WADA ALLEGES SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SHOW THAT FUSIONSTORM TO SATISFY THE MINIMAL PLEADING REQUIREMENTS FOR ALLEGING PUNITIVE DAMAGES LIABILITY AGAINST A CORPORATION PER CIVIL CODE 3294(B). OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID T. WANG OF THE WANG LEGAL GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-415-887-2037 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RONNIE ARENAS OF THE LYNBERG & WATKINS, APC, TEL. NO. 1-714-937-1010 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FUSIONSTORM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Defendant FusionStorm, Inc.'s demurrer to the eleventh cause of action for violation of the Fair Pay Act is overruled. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID T. WANG OF THE WANG LEGAL GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-415-887-2037 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RONNIE ARENAS OF THE LYNBERG & WATKINS, APC, TEL. NO. 1-714-937-1010 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FUSIONSTORM Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint - Defendant FusionStorm, Inc.'s motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint is denied. Plaintiff Lori Wada alleges sufficient facts to show that FusionStorm to satisfy the minimal pleading requirements for alleging punitive damages liability against a corporation per Civil Code 3294(b). Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
